package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "sync"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for sync_mutex_for_atomic_counter: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `mu.Lock(); count++; mu.Unlock()` for simple integer counters
type CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterModel
}

type CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterService struct {
    repo *CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveSyncMutexForAtomicCounter(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseSyncMutexForAtomicCounterDTO) error {
    focus := "sync_mutex_for_atomic_counter"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    var mu sync.Mutex
    count := 0
    for range items {
        mu.Lock()
        count++
        mu.Unlock()
    }
    _ = count
    sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive := map[string]int{"sync": 1, "mutex": 2, "atomic": 3, "counter": 4}
    sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    sync_positive_0 := sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive["sync"] + len(input)
    _ = sync_positive_0
    mutex_positive_1 := sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive["mutex"] + len(input)
    _ = mutex_positive_1
    atomic_positive_2 := sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive["atomic"] + len(input)
    _ = atomic_positive_2
    counter_positive_3 := sync_mutex_atomic_counter_positive["counter"] + len(input)
    _ = counter_positive_3
    return nil
}
